arts.ttl: Oscar Bobb injury update: Pep Guardiola confirms if Man City attacker will return for Champions League clash against Club Brugge
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola delivers a positive update on the fitness of Oscar Bobb ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash with Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: FA release Myles Lewis-Skelly Arsenal statement as Man City discover appeal decision
arts.sum: Manchester City are due to take on Arsenal in their next Premier League match - and the Gunners will have Myles Lewis-Skelly available.

arts.ttl: Why Gary Neville was right to say Cole Palmer should not have spoken on the pitch to Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: The former Man City colleagues were seen chatting and laughing together in the wake of City's 3-1 win over Chelsea

arts.ttl: What Man City need to qualify for Champions League knockout phase
arts.sum: How Manchester City can qualify for the Champions League knockout rounds on matchday eight of the league phase.

arts.ttl: Lauren Hemp injury latest and expected Man City return date
arts.sum: Manchester City winger Lauren Hemp has been sidelined since November following surgery on a knee injury.

arts.ttl: Guardiola and Man City face prospect of Champions League exit: 'I appreciate all of your concern'
arts.sum: With Manchester City needing a win to avoid a stunning early exit from the Champions League, Pep Guardiola wasn’t in the mood to discuss the prospect of his once-dominant team crashing out of European club soccer’s most prestigious competition. Hosting Belgian champion Brugge at the Etihad Stadium, City would ordinarily be expected to win — particularly given its 34-game unbeaten home run in Europe that stretches back to 2018.

arts.ttl: Special Manchester City "City Till I Die" Digital Kit Released
arts.sum: EA Sports has unveiled an exclusive new digital kit for Manchester City in FC 25, featuring a striking urban design that pays homage to fan culture and the club's identity.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola responds to Man City's financial fears ahead of Champions League decider
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's Manchester City face a make or break Champions League clash against Belgian side Club Brugge and the Spaniard has revealed his real motivations for victory

arts.ttl: Rodri surprise, Khusanov reaction, Bobb boost - 24 Man City players train before Club Brugge fixture
arts.sum: Manchester City trained ahead of their Champions League clash with Club Brugge on Wednesday with two surprise faces watching on.

arts.ttl: Anywhere between €55-80m – Manchester City offer expected, price all over the place
arts.sum: Juventus are waiting for Manchester City to make their move for Andrea Cambiaso to unlock the transfer funds for themselves to invest back into the squad. That’s according to Calciomercato.it who say Juventus are likely to be busy in the final days of the January transfer window if Manchester City make their move for Cambiaso. The post Anywhere between €55-80m – Manchester City offer expected, price all over the place appeared first on Sport Witness.
